name: Fire King Avatar Barong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バロン
desc: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during the next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Add 1 "Fire King" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Fire King Avatar Barong".
mnst_eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during the next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Add 1 "Fire King" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Fire King Avatar Barong".
eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during the next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Add 1 "Fire King" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Fire King Avatar Barong".

sets.set: Onslaught of the Fire Kings Structure Deck

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
